response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video. 2. Identified the performer as Juufutei Raden from on-screen text (#らでん新衣装お披露目3Dライブ). 3. Segmented the video into two parts: a talk section and an instrumental outro section. 4. Audited all audio for vocal musical performances. Confirmed that the music played during the outro is purely instrumental background music, not a vocal song.
response.global_summary: The video features VTuber Juufutei Raden announcing special merchandise and collaborations during her 3D Live stream, followed by an outro segment with instrumental background music. No vocal songs were performed in this segment.

scenes.description: Juufutei Raden introduces various merchandise and campaign announcements. She speaks to the audience throughout. No vocal music is playing.
The stream concludes with Juufutei Raden posing on stage while an instrumental background track plays.
